results.final_skill_tail:
, then '[DOC] [TLE] <title> [PAR] <passage>'.
- If the prompt includes a short prefix such as '(quick one)', preserve it before the context block, e.g. '(quick one) ## Context'.
- When the requested source is a Wikipedia-style title, include the title verbatim in '[TLE] <title> - Wikipedia' and provide the opening encyclopedic sentence or passage after '[PAR]'.
